chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-3996 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs 1. For orders on Misc. No.20090/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections 1 to 8 3. For orders on Misc. No.16387/2025 (Exp/A) 4. For hearing of main case ---------------------------------------------- 06.10.2025 Mr. Naeem Ali Bazenjo, advocate for petitioner ------------------------------------------- Petitioners have issued legal notice dated 10.02.2025 to the Managing Director, Karachi Water and Sewerage Board, Karachi, in respect of non-provision of water despite payment of challan. The legal notice is converted into a complaint and the Managing Director, Karachi Water and Sewerage Corporation, Karachi is directed to decide the complaint of the petitioners within three months of the date of this order, after giving a right to be heard to the petitioners, through a speaking order. However, a copy of this order shall be sent to the Managing Director, Karachi Water and Sewerage Corporation along with pages 55 to 63 of the file, for compliance. The instant petition is disposed of in the above terms. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES J U D G E Gulsher/PS
